lint.output: 1 pre-existing warning in flow-canvas.tsx (not owned file), 0 errors in changed files

notes: Added pointerEvents: 'none' to section container div so clicks pass through to child step nodes. Added pointerEvents: 'auto' on interactive children: annotation indicator dot, section label div (flex row containing name + maturity badge), and comment count badge. Section background clicks still reach the React Flow node wrapper because pointer-events: none on the content div allows the parent wrapper to receive the event for section selection via onNodeClick.
